title: The Names of the Messenger of God's Bows and Lances
description: Milch Sheep (Mand'ill)1°34 Al-Harith-Ibn Sa 'd-Muhammad b. 'Umar-Zakariya' b. Yahyi -Ibrahim b. 'Abdallih from the descendants of 'Utbah b. Ghazwan: The Messenger of God 's milch sheep were seven: 'Ajwah, Zamzam, Suva, Barakah, Warisah, 1O35 AI1a1,1O36 and Afraf.1O37 Al-Harith-Ibn Sa'd-Muhammad [b. 'Umarj-Abu Ishaq'Abbid b. Man$ur1O38 -'Ikrimah1039-Ibn 'Abbas: The milch goats of the Messenger of God were seven in number, and they were tended by Ibn Umm Ayman.1040 The Names of the Messenger of God's Swords Al-Harith-Ibn Sa'd-Muhammad b. 'Umar-Abu Bakr b.

sources.citation: al-Tabari, The History of al-Tabari (SUNY), vol. 09
